column1: ReviewText

Aspect: tracking. The left click started double-clicking after 3 months. Worst durability. Clicks are crystal clear and snappy. Highly recommended. Keywords: double clicking, durability, snappy, highly recommended.
Aspect: tracking. The scroll wheel is broken. It scrolls down when I scroll up. The scroll wheel has great tactile feedback. Keywords: scroll wheel, broken, tactile.
Aspect: value. Worst durability. Clicks are crystal clear and snappy. A bit overpriced, but highly recommended. Keywords:  durability, overpriced,  highly recommended.

Aspect: software. The companion app is terrible, it crashes constantly on my Android phone. Can't even update the firmware. Highly recommended, snaps smoothly, and very consistent tracking. Keywords: app, crash,  highly recommended, tracking.

Aspect: battery. Very comfortable for all-day wearing. My only issue is the Bluetooth connection occasionally drops when my phone is in my pocket. The battery indicator is useful, works well with my Mac. Keywords: battery, bluetooth, comfort.
